items.text: norn crate exists as a workspace member with edition 2021
Cargo.toml declares unsafe_code = deny and pedantic clippy lints
src/lib.rs declares public modules: provider, loop, tool, tools, rules, agent, session, integration, error
error.rs defines NornError with thiserror, no anyhow in library code
Provider trait defined with stream method returning typed ProviderEvent stream
ProviderEvent enum covers text_delta, thinking_delta, tool_call_delta, done, error
Usage struct tracks input tokens, output tokens, cache hits, and cost
OpenAI Responses API provider implements the Provider trait
OpenAI provider supports streaming via SSE
OpenAI provider supports tool calling with function definitions
OpenAI provider supports response_format with JSON schema for structured output
OpenAI provider supports reasoning effort control
OpenAI provider supports server-side web search via ToolSpec::WebSearch
OpenAI provider supports model selection across GPT-5.x family
Agent loop accepts provider, tools, context, instruction, and output schema
Agent loop executes prompt-tool cycle until model stops or schema-valid output is produced
Output schema validation rejects non-conforming output and feeds error back to model
Token-by-token streaming events emitted during LLM response
Per-event output schemas configurable for assistant message, spoken response, tool call envelope, stop output, question, handoff, review, progress
Inbound channels deliver messages at controlled tool boundaries without interrupting
Steer delivery mode injects after current tool batch before next LLM call
Follow-up delivery mode injects only when agent would otherwise stop
Token threshold detection warns when context approaches window limit
Soft handoff injects wrap-up guidance at configurable threshold
Repeated failure detection identifies looping on same error
Semantic quality signals detect hedging language and premature completion
Tool trait defines name, description, input_schema, pre_validate, execute, post_validate, on_success
Pre-validate phase supports both compile-time (baked-in) and runtime (profile-configured) checks
Post-validate phase supports both compile-time and runtime checks
On-success phase supports both compile-time and runtime follow-ups
Tool call envelope carries model-supplied args, runtime-supplied inputs, and open metadata field
Runtime-supplied tool arguments injected from profile/policy before execution
Effect-based parallel scheduling runs read-only tools concurrently, serializes write tools
Bash risk classification categorizes commands into five runtime-evaluated tiers
Dynamic tool availability changes available tools based on profile, workflow stage, or task state
ToolRegistry supports adding, removing, and querying tools at runtime
Read tool reads files with line numbers, image support, and binary detection
Write tool enforces read-before-overwrite for existing files
Write tool validates AST via tree-sitter after writing
Write tool enforces configurable file length limits with path-specific overrides
Edit tool enforces read-before-edit
Edit tool validates AST via tree-sitter after editing
Edit tool reports diff output and blast radius via LSP
Search tool combines ripgrep, nucleo fuzzy search, glob filtering, and AST search
Bash tool streams output with progress detection
WebSearch tool delegates to OpenAI server-side search for Codex models
WebFetch tool fetches URLs and converts HTML to markdown
LSP tool provides hover, go-to-definition, find references, document symbols, and diagnostics
SpawnAgent tool creates a sub-agent with task, model, role, and optional forked context
Fork tool forks the current agent onto a different model and returns structured audit result
SendMessage, WaitAgent, and CloseAgent tools implement inter-agent coordination
Task tool supports create, list, update, and complete operations
Skill tool loads a SKILL.md prompt template into context
RunScript tool executes inline Rhai scripts with sandboxed host functions
ToolSearch tool performs BM25 search over the tool catalog
Rules parsed from files with YAML front matter specifying trigger conditions
Path glob triggers fire on file read/write matching configured patterns
Bash/tool command triggers fire on command/tool invocation matching configured patterns
Triggers configurable as before or after the matched action
System context append delivery mode adds rule to system prompt for the session
Context injection delivery mode delivers rule at next input boundary
Message delivery mode sends rule as a conversation message
Lifecycle tracking detects when a rule has been edited out of context and re-injects on next trigger
Rules with shell execution generate dynamic content at injection time
Agent registry tracks active agents with hierarchical paths and statuses
No hardcoded concurrency limits on agent count
Two-phase spawn reservation with RAII cleanup on failure
Mailbox messaging supports trigger_turn flag for immediate vs deferred delivery
Sequence numbers on mailboxes enable efficient wait-for-any without polling
Fork inherits filtered parent context and returns structured audit result
RunMonitored tool delegates monitoring to a lightweight model and returns handle for queries
Goal tracking supports objectives, token budgets, time budgets, and continuation policies
Scheduling supports session-dispatched cron that re-launches sessions without keeping them alive
Session events are append-only with IDs and parent IDs forming a tree
Suppress operation excludes events from prompt construction without deleting them
Summarize operation replaces event sequences with structured summaries
Inject operation adds external context into the event stream
Compact operation summarizes everything before a cut point
Prompt construction is a view over events, not a mutation
Claude Runner integration routes steps via profile configuration and produces StepOutcome
Norn-wrapped Claude Code mode strips native tools and provides Norn tools via MCP
MCP client connects to external tool servers and registers tools dynamically
MCP server mode exposes all Norn tools via standard MCP protocol
Rhai builtins expose run_agent, spawn_agent, send_message, wait_agent, close_agent, fork_agent
Extension system integrates with Meridian extension protocol for shared out-of-process extensions
Diagnostics integration reports tool failures, schema violations, and policy violations at compiler grade
Session variables are declarative and scriptable with shell execution at prompt construction time
Lifecycle hooks support pre/post tool call, pre/post LLM call, and session events
LoopContext has an optional DiagnosticCollector field (Option<Arc<DiagnosticCollector>>)
Runner pushes NornDiagnostic into LoopContext::diagnostics on schema validation failure
Runner pushes NornDiagnostic into LoopContext::diagnostics on pre-validate block
Runner pushes NornDiagnostic into LoopContext::diagnostics on post-validate failure
File-modification tools count code lines via tokei (not naive non-blank line counting)
File length threshold is caller-configured with no hardcoded default — omitted threshold means no check
LengthLimit.default is Option<usize> where None disables the length check
PostValidateMode is configurable at runtime via ToolContext flags, not fixed per tool
Tool validation results include structured diagnostic JSON (code, line, severity, message, fix, do_not)
DiagnosticCollector is published on ToolContext typed infrastructure so RuntimePostValidateCheck implementations can push
